summary: Iteration 52: Verified two critical bug fixes - (1) Push notification crash prevention by removing auto-init from login and making it opt-in from Settings > Security, (2) Ghost user prevention by cascade-closing attendance on staff deletion and filtering deleted users from dashboard stats.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js line 110: Comment confirms 'Push notifications are opt-in from Settings — not auto-initialized on login'
AuthContext.js lines 88-91: crypto.randomUUID fallback with try/catch - uses Date.now + Math.random if crypto.randomUUID fails
RestaurantSettings.js lines 828-857: Push Notifications card with Enable button that dynamically imports push.js
staff.py lines 197-213: delete_staff cascade-closes open attendance records with flagged=True, flag_reason='user_deleted'
attendance.py lines 564-568: dashboard-stats filters out deleted users by checking user existence before counting
attendance.py lines 665-690: force_close_stale_shifts endpoint for admin cleanup of orphan records
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_temp_staff_* for cascade delete testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified: (1) Push notification init COMPLETELY removed from AuthContext login flow - no initPushNotifications() call. Push is now opt-in only from Settings > Security > Enable button. (2) Staff deletion cascade-closes open attendance records with flag_reason='user_deleted'. (3) Dashboard clocked_in query checks if user still exists before counting. (4) New endpoint POST /api/attendance/force-close-stale for admin cleanup. (5) crypto.randomUUID fallback uses Date.now + Math.random if crypto API unavailable.

push_notification_removed_from_login.evidence: No 'initPushNotifications' or 'push' references in AuthContext.js. Console logs show no push-related activity on login.

push_notification_opt_in_settings.evidence: Settings > Security tab shows Push Notifications card with Enable button (data-testid='enable-push-btn')

crypto_randomUUID_fallback.evidence: AuthContext.js lines 88-91: try { crypto.randomUUID() } catch { Date.now() + Math.random() }

staff_delete_cascade_attendance.evidence: Backend test passed: DELETE /api/restaurant/staff/{id} returns closed_shifts count >= 1

dashboard_stats_filters_deleted_users.evidence: Backend test passed: GET /api/attendance/dashboard-stats returns clocked_in_count excluding deleted users

force_close_stale_endpoint.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/attendance/force-close-stale returns {message, closed} for orphan records

multiple_logins_no_crash.evidence: Backend test passed: Admin login, staff login, admin login again - all successful without crash
